channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, June 4, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
1. Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, June 4, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
  2. Ukraine war briefing: Russia losing on the ground so pivots to air war, say analysts  The Guardian
  3. Kyiv’s war wins mean messaging victories, too  Politico
  4. The Russia-Ukraine War Report Card, June 3, 2026  Russia Matters
  5. Ukraine pushed Russia back in May for second month running, ISW finds  France 24
item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: Ukraine scales up drone attacks in Moscow, across Russia to record highs, data shows - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
item.description:
1. Ukraine scales up drone attacks in Moscow, across Russia to record highs, data shows  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  2. Robots are redefining the war in Ukraine – and forcing Russia onto the back foot  CNN
  3. Ukraine’s New FPVs Hit Targets Sixty Miles Behind Russian Lines  Forbes
  4. The New Weapon Behind Ukraine’s Battlefield Success  Foreign Policy
  5. Ukraine turns real-life kills into video game thrills for drone pilots  The Washington Post
item.source: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
